title: World Championships in Delhi: Why Badminton Needs Gen Z, Gen Alpha Watchers
indian_angle: This article discusses the future of badminton viewership in India, specifically for the upcoming World Championships in Delhi.
summary: An opinion piece exploring the necessity of attracting younger generations to badminton, especially with India hosting the BWF World Championships in Delhi.

title: Haryana U-19 Tournament Postponed, Bhubaneswar Now World Junior Selection Event
indian_angle: This directly impacts junior Indian players aiming for the BWF World Junior Championships, as a key selection tournament has been changed.
summary: The BAI announced the postponement of the Haryana U-19 Ranking Tournament and designated the Bhubaneswar U-19 event as the selection tournament for the BWF World Junior Championships 2026.

title: BAI President Sarma on India Open Incident: 'What is the problem if monkeys come?'
indian_angle: This features a direct quote from the President of the Badminton Association of India regarding a peculiar incident at a major Indian event.
summary: BAI President Himanta Biswa Sarma made a notable comment regarding the presence of monkeys at the India Open, sparking discussion.

title: 3x15 Scoring System Implemented for Domestic Junior Tournaments
indian_angle: This is a significant rule change affecting all domestic junior badminton tournaments and national championships in India.
summary: The Badminton Association of India has implemented a new 3x15 scoring system for all domestic ranking tournaments and national championships for U-13, U-15, and U-17 age groups.

title: Kidambi Srikanth Reaches US Open Final, Falls at Last Hurdle
indian_angle: An Indian top player reached a major international final, a significant achievement for Indian badminton fans.
summary: Kidambi Srikanth made it to the final of the US Open but was unable to secure the title, losing in the last step.

title: Chennai to Host Yonex-Sunrise All India Senior Ranking Tournament
indian_angle: This announces an important upcoming domestic tournament for senior Indian players.
summary: The Yonex-Sunrise All India Senior Ranking Badminton Tournament 2026 is scheduled to take place in Chennai, Tamil Nadu, from July 16th to 23rd.
